en: So how's your lady? Yeah, she's gone.
Gone? Gone where? Uh, med school. Medical school in California.
It was like a week ago.
So, uh, when are you done with those meetings? Like the week after I'm 21.
Yeah? Are they going to hook you up with a job or what?
Yeah, if I can sit in a room and do long division for the next 50 years.
ko: 응, 다음 50년 동안 방에 앉아서 나눗셈만 하면 좋겠네.

en: Yeah, probably make some nice bank though. I'm going to be a fucking lab rat.
Better than this shit. Way out of here.
